title: Molecular Machine Learning
description: Developing novel molecular representations and graph neural networks for predicting chemical reactivity, selectivity, and discovering new reactions through virtual screening.

title: Reaction Assessment
description: Smart screening technologies including additive-based robustness screening and condition-based sensitivity screening for systematic reaction evaluation.

title: Accelerated Discovery
description: High-throughput experimentation combined with machine learning to accelerate the discovery of new chemical transformations and optimize reaction conditions.

title: Retrosynthetic AI
description: Artificial intelligence approaches for retrosynthetic planning, enabling computer-guided synthesis route design for complex organic molecules.
